texto: When you are grateful,' Brother Steindl-Rast explained, 'you are not fearful, and when you are not fearful, you are not violent. When you are grateful, you act out of a sense of enough and not out of a sense of scarcity, and you are willing to share. If you are grateful, you are enjoying the differences between people and respectful to all people. The grateful world is a world of joyful people. Grateful people are joyful people. A grateful world is a happy world.
explicacao: Citação de Douglas Carlton Abrams sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “When you are grateful,' Brother Steindl-Rast explained, 'you are not fearful, and when you are no…” articula gratidao, fearlessness, generosity em registro de gratidao, com relevância para contextos como generosity e gratitude.

frase_original: When you are grateful,' Brother Steindl-Rast explained, 'you are not fearful, and when you are not fearful, you are not violent. When you are grateful, you act out of a sense of enough and not out of a sense of scarcity, and you are willing to share. If you are grateful, you are enjoying the differences between people and respectful to all people. The grateful world is a world of joyful people. Grateful people are joyful people. A grateful world is a happy world.
